component.name: Beamish
component.summary: Send and receive files with Android phones over Quick Share

description.p: Beamish is a small desktop app that sends and receives files with Android phones over Google Quick Share (Nearby Share). It uses Bluetooth LE / L2CAP to make contact and Wi-Fi for the fast data transfer, just like sharing between two Android devices.

ul.li: Receive files from nearby phones with a consent prompt and verification PIN
Send files to discovered phones, picked through the file-chooser portal
Lives in the system tray and stays discoverable in the background
Automatic Bluetooth-to-Wi-Fi upgrade for full-speed transfers

screenshot.caption: Beamish ready to receive a file

description.p: More reliable Wi-Fi bandwidth-upgrade handshake when the phone retries.
Faster, more reliable Wi-Fi transfers and graceful shutdown handling.
Send to nearby phones with an outbound verification PIN, plus a file-picker fix.
First release: receive files over Quick Share with tray integration.
